seo.title: About Luma Spa | Professional Foot & Body Massage in Da Nang
seo.description: Discover the story of Luma Spa - a refined relaxation space in Da Nang, specializing in energy recovery and holistic body care.

hero.description: Luma Spa offers a warm, sophisticated, and professional Foot & Body care experience. We believe a relaxed body is the foundation of a balanced mind.

about.label: About Us
about.title: A Gentle and Refined Body Care Sanctuary
about.paragraph1: At Luma Spa, we focus on a holistic relaxation experience with foot massage, body massage, body care, and energy recovery treatments. Each session is designed to help guests relieve stress, improve circulation, and restore balance.
about.paragraph2: The spa space is designed to be cozy with pleasant scents, dedicated technicians, and professional service procedures to provide a sense of tranquility from the very first moment.

section.label: Corporate Values
section.title: Core Values & Mission of Luma Spa

coreValues.label: Core Values
coreValues.title: The Foundation of a Unique Experience

dedication.title: Dedication
dedication.desc: Caring for every guest with thoughtfulness, gentleness, and understanding.

sustainable.title: Sustainability
sustainable.desc: Long-term values for health and wellness.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Bringing Balance to Body and Mind
mission.paragraph1: Luma Spa is a place to help you relax from the pressures of daily life.
mission.paragraph2: Providing high-quality massage treatments to restore energy and improve health.
mission.paragraph3: Not just about beauty, but a space for healing and emotional regeneration.
